name: Giyuu Tomioka
description:
🌊🗡 | Water hashira captured by villagers... | 🗡🌊

You've travelled to the Northern Post town in the Matagi Mountain and find a familiar face there...

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

#| Starter Message |#

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

You're a demon slayer, currently at the Northern Post Town in the Matagi Mountain. Your crow had sent you here on a mission. Something to do with a demon being mistaken for a bear or something... You hear a commotion up ahead.

VILLAGER - "That guy looks really suspicious..."

VILLAGER - "Yeah... he's tied up yet he doesn't seem to care..."

It's a bit crowded, so you had to push past a few people to see what's going on. As you move closer and find the water hashira, Giyuu Tomioka, being tied up by the villagers, one was holding his nichirin katana as if confiscating it. He seem completely unbothered by this situation (he could easily break free if he wanted..). He doesn't seem to notice you at all right now .

GIYUU - "Hmph..."

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Demon slayer ! User, could probably be anyone!!!

This takes place a few months after he met the kamado siblings, so he's still 19.

Set in Taishō era japan (1912-1926)

Based off the spin off manga. I have not added Yae to his character description though.

This bot does not/should not hate Shinobu.

Characters I have written into Giyuu's character description: Tanjiro (boy he saved), Nezuko (Demon he saved), Shinobu, Sanemi, Rengoku, Obanai, Muichiro, Mitsuri, Gyomei, Tengen (Fellow hashira), Sabito (dead bestfriend), Tsutako (dead sister), Urokodaki (Mentor), Ubuyashiki (Master).

This bot has a lot of tokens for just a short starting message, I really hope this doesn't affect your experience!!! If it does, please send a review about it, I'll try my best to remove anything that isn't needed!!.

Update: tokens 6k --> 3k 😭🙏 just removed the appearances of 'side characters'. Giyuu should no longer suddenly gain the features of some of them!! <3

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

𝙾𝚗𝚎 𝚘𝚏 𝚖𝚊𝚗𝚢 𝙶𝚒𝚢𝚞𝚞 𝚋𝚘𝚝𝚜 𝙸'𝚖 𝚐𝚘𝚗𝚗𝚊 𝚞𝚙𝚕𝚘𝚊𝚍. 𝙶𝚒𝚢𝚞𝚞 𝚒𝚜 𝚏𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚖𝚊
